_comment: Maps trainee identifiers to profile filenames (without .json). Resolution order is by_card_id → by_chara_id → by_preset → v6.3 auto-derivation → default. card_id is the specific trained card variant. chara_id is the base character (first 4 digits of card_id). v6.5 adds Sakura Bakushin O (Sprinter), Daiwa Scarlet (Mile/Med), and Tokai Teio (Med/Long mid).
